examples: He's happy to mooch around the house all day.
I didn't want Ron coming over trying to mooch off of me like he always does.
That doesn't mean you mooch off of other people.
That will leave us the afternoons free - either to mooch about the Olympic site and soak up the atmosphere, or we can go into town before coming home.
Still, Joe was furtive, so no one would mooch.
